title: Date A Live Custom GUI Pack
description: Date A Live Custom GUI Pack
body: **![Preview Image](https://i.imgur.com/5tOAw0b.png)** **Introduction:** This is a GUI-only resource pack inspired by the anime "Date A Live." It works with any other resource packs by simply placing it on top. The custom palette includes blue, purple, and pink, with unique visuals for every container, including the hot bar. Future updates may introduce new color schemes like red and black. If you encounter any bugs, please report them for a quick fix. **Community Engagement:** Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) to suggest future packs, participate in anime discussions, and enter monthly giveaways for Discord Nitro! [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ] --- **Feature Highlights:** - **Options Menu:** ![Options Menu](https://i.imgur.com/bppGs59.png) - **Hud:** ![Hud](https://i.imgur.com/JzBbbEj.png) - **Anvil:** ![Anvil](https://i.imgur.com/VOASB66.png) - **Smithing Table:** ![Smithing Table](https://i.imgur.com/ylxulqK.png) - **Crafting Table:** ![Crafting Table](https://i.imgur.com/GURAC8t.png) - **Brewing Stand:** ![Brewing Stand](https://i.imgur.com/RyV9C3o.png) - **Smoker:** ![Smoker](https://i.imgur.com/v5eiT4U.png) - **Furnace:** ![Furnace](https://i.imgur.com/6WLqYAs.png) - **Chest:** ![Chest](https://i.imgur.com/yMJOJDK.png) - **Dropper:** ![Dropper](https://i.imgur.com/3VDoAXO.png) - **Inventory:** ![Inventory](https://i.imgur.com/03RjSX3.png) - **Villager Trading Menu:** ![Villager Trading Menu](https://i.imgur.com/4qZBgYD.png) **Additional Resources:** - Explore more packs on [ListarMC](https://listarmc.com/) - Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) to suggest new packs, vote on upcoming designs, and participate in anime discussions. **Thank you for your support! ❤️**
